meaning: int.温和的惊讶,感动,敬畏时所用的感叹词
examples: Jiminy Cricket: a conscience is that still, small voice that people won't listen to.
Jiminy Peak says it is the only mountain resort in North America to produce its own power using wind energy.
You discover Dr. Bob, her therapist, is like Jiminy Cricket, always the voice of reason (and has the jazz hands to prove it).
